title: cleretum gramineum
intro: Cleretum gramineum, also known as the South African daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape province in South Africa. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Cleretum gramineum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
